name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
bio: Raja Krishnamoorthi is a U.S. Representative from Illinois who filed for the 2026 Democratic U.S. Senate primary. He has represented IL-08 in Congress and previously worked in state and federal policy roles. (Source: Shaw Local primary ballot guide, March 5, 2026: https://www.shawlocal.com/northwest-herald/2026/03/05/illinois-primary-ballot-heres-whos-running-in-the-march-17-election/)

jacket.note: FEC totals pending direct ETL import.
